subject: [PATCH resend v6 01/30] mm: move vma_alloc_folio_noprof to page_alloc.c

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Expressed concern that the ordering of patches causes thrashing between two sets (alignment and USER_ADDR_NONE). Suggested reordering to improve followability.

reviews.author: Michael S. Tsirkin
reviews.summary: Agreed to reorder patches, specifically putting alignment before threading, and acknowledged that the main work will be on the hugetlb thing.

2026-05-11.patch_summary: Discussion about reordering patches in the mm: alloc_swap_folio series to improve alignment and reduce thrashing.
